carrier_gateway_id.description: The ID of the carrier gateway associated with the route.

core_network_arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the core network associated with the route.

destination_cidr_block.description: The IPv4 CIDR block that the route will cover.

destination_ipv6_cidr_block.description: The IPv6 CIDR block that the route will cover.

destination_prefix_list_id.description: The ID of the prefix list the route will cover.

egress_only_gateway_id.description: The ID of the egress-only internet gateway associated with the route.

gateway_id.description: The ID of the gateway associated with the route.

instance_id.description: The ID of the instance associated with the route.

local_gateway_id.description: The ID of the local gateway associated with the route.

nat_gateway_id.description: The ID of the NAT gateway associated with the route.

network_interface_id.description: The ID of the network interface associated with the route.

transit_gateway_id.description: The ID of the transit gateway associated with the route.

vpc_peering_connection_id.description: The ID of the VPC peering connection associated with the route.
